name: Apricot Almond Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 3 cups whole wheat bread, day-old, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a greased shallow 1 1/2-quart casserole dish, lightly toss together bread cubes, dried apricots, and almonds.
2. In a medium bowl, beat together eggs, milk, sugar, vanilla extract, and almond extract until combined.
3. Pour the egg mixture over the bread and fruit mixture in the casserole dish.
4. Cover and refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Bake in the preheated oven for about 45 to 55 minutes, or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
7. Serve hot or refrigerate to serve chilled.
